Open to Work · Canada
Intro

Chapter I

The First Line of Code

2009 · Hyderabad, India

Program.cs — Cyient · 2009
1using System;
2
3namespace Cyient.Enterprise {
4 class SolutionBuilder {
5 static void Main() {
6 // First line. First system.
7 Console.WriteLine("Hello, Enterprise");
8 }
9 }
10}
11
2009

"Every architect starts as a builder."

A single line of code. The beginning of sixteen years of enterprise software delivery. At Cyient, the first professional role: writing C# in Visual Studio, building systems for real users with real consequences.

Every transformation begins with understanding how things are built — brick by brick, line by line.

Software DeveloperC# · .NETVisual StudioCyient
CY

Cyient

Engineering & Technology Services · 2009

Chapter II · 2010 — 2017

Understanding Enterprises

Building software teaches implementation. Building enterprise systems teaches responsibility.

2010

ATOS Syntel

Software Engineer

Healthcare Systems

Built enterprise healthcare platforms serving thousands of clinical users. First encounter with mission-critical software — systems where quality is not optional.

2013

Tata Consultancy Services

Senior Software Engineer

Large-Scale Enterprise

Scaled to enterprise-grade delivery. Complex data models, multi-team coordination, performance constraints. Enterprise delivery at its most demanding.

2017

Senior Engineer

Technical Lead

Systems Integration

Connecting heterogeneous enterprise systems. ETL pipelines, SSIS workflows, SQL Server optimization. Data became the foundation of everything.

Seven years. Three organizations. Thousands of enterprise users.
The foundation was set.

Chapter III · 2017 — 2019

Thinking Beyond Code

Users
REST API
API Gateway
Business Logic
Data Layer
Integrations
SQL Server

"The challenge was no longer writing software.
It was designing systems capable of evolving."

API DesignSystem DesignArchitecture ReviewsDomain-Driven DesignSOLID

Chapter IX

The Enterprise AI Architect

Technology alone does not create transformation. Transformation happens when architecture, strategy, and intelligence align.

🏗️

Solution Architect

12 enterprise applications. Architecture governance. Technology roadmaps.

☁️

Cloud Architect

AWS cloud-native. EC2, ECS, Lambda, S3. Infrastructure as Code.

🧠

GenAI Architect

Claude, GPT, Gemini. RAG pipelines. Prompt engineering. Production AI.

👥

Technology Leader

38+ engineers. Cross-functional teams. Architecture reviews. Mentoring.

🚀

AI Transformation Leader

Enterprise AI adoption. Governance frameworks. Responsible AI strategy.
